3010080.name: 3 Chicas in Tech Soundtrack
3010080.description:
Enter the Center for Women Engineers


The soundtrack of 3 Chicas in Tech captures the essence of the CWE where Sofia will overcome various obstacles to fulfill her dream. The work is made up of soft piano notes that surround the place in an atmosphere of calm and learning as well as fun. The melodies change rhythms as Sofia discovers areas and interacts with the environment.

Credits

Musical work composed by Indira Cardús.
